raw_consumer_statement: Please see XXXX previous complaints that were closed as a result of the company 's response. But the company is not addressing the issues. This was a fraudulent account. They have justified it as a valid account stating I requested to be added as an authorized user. But they also provided a credit application ( with a scribbled line as my signature ) as proof that I authorized the opening of this account. It doesn't make sense that I would sign a credit application and then request to be added as an authorized user. I specifically called on XX/XX/year> to report the card as fraudulent. In addition, they have not provided validation of the XXXX charge made to this account. They reference a signed contract with a merchant but has not provided a copy of that signed contract.
